OSC CALENDAR OF OCT-27-1999, SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $200.00 FOR FAILURE TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), TO FILE POS; OBTAIN ANSWER OR ENTER DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT. OSC AND SANCTIONS AGAINST PLTF'S ATTY FREYDKIS IRA, WHO IS REQUIRED TO FILE STATUS STATEMENT 20 DAYS PRIOR TO HEARING. OSC CALENDAR OF DEC-08-1999, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO OBTAIN ANSWER OR ENTER DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT. TO PAY OUTSTANDING SANCTIONS. OSC AS TO PLTF'S ATTY FREYDKIS IRA, WHO IS REQUIRED TO FILE STATUS STATEMENT 20 DAYS PRIOR TO HEARING. NO ENTRY OF DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT UNTIL OUTSTANDING SANCTIONS ARE PAID. HEARING SET FOR FEB-02-2000 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 212 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
